idea-plugin.name: CommitCat
idea-plugin.description:
CommitCat — Your Coding Companion

Connect your JetBrains IDE to the CommitCat desktop pet. A pixel-art cat lives on your desktop and grows with your coding activity.

What it tracks

  • Coding time — 60-second heartbeat while your IDE is active
  • File changes — detects when you switch files (filename + language)
  • File saves — reacts when you save your work
  • Build results — celebrates on success, reacts on failure (+15 XP on success)

Supported IDEs

IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, CLion, RustRover, DataGrip, Rider, Android Studio

Privacy

  • All data stays local — sent only to the CommitCat desktop app on localhost
  • No code content is collected
  • No external servers contacted
  • Plugin silently pauses if CommitCat desktop app is not running

Requires the CommitCat desktop app to be running.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Coding time heartbeat (60s interval)
  • File change and save detection
  • Build success/failure tracking with XP rewards
  • Status bar widget
  • Automatic pause when IDE loses focus
